# GigSafe

> GigSafe is a trustless freelance escrow protocol on Solana. Clients lock USDC in non-custodial smart contracts, freelancers complete milestone-based work, and AI resolves disputes in minutes. 0.5% fee — 40x cheaper than Upwork.

## Key Facts

- **Platform fee**: 0.5% (vs 20% on Fiverr, 10-20% on Upwork)
- **Payout speed**: Instant (vs 7-14 days on traditional platforms)
- **Dispute resolution**: AI-powered, minutes (vs weeks manual review)
- **Custody**: Non-custodial Program Derived Accounts (PDAs) on Solana
- **Network**: Solana (devnet live, mainnet planned)
- **Token**: USDC

## How It Works

1. Client creates a gig with milestones and deposits USDC into escrow
2. Freelancer accepts and completes milestone work
3. Client approves → funds release instantly to freelancer
4. Disputes: both parties submit evidence → AI analyzes → funds split on-chain

## Core Features

- On-chain milestone payments
- AI dispute resolution (Llama 3.3 70B / Groq)
- Non-custodial escrow (PDA)
- File upload for deliverables
- In-gig messaging
- Reputation and reviews
- TypeScript SDK (@gigsafe/sdk)
- Freelancer bidding
- Gig categories (11 types)
- Invoice/receipt generation

## Key Pages

- [Landing Page](https://gigsafe.pixxmo.com/) — Product overview and comparison
- [Browse Gigs](https://gigsafe.pixxmo.com/gigs) — Open gigs on Solana
- [Create Gig](https://gigsafe.pixxmo.com/create) — Post a new gig with escrow
- [Faucet](https://gigsafe.pixxmo.com/faucet) — Get devnet test USDC
- [Dashboard](https://gigsafe.pixxmo.com/dashboard) — Manage your gigs

## Comparison

| Feature | GigSafe | Upwork | Fiverr |
|---------|---------|--------|--------|
| Fee | 0.5% | 10-20% | 20% |
| Payout | Instant | 7-14 days | 14 days |
| Disputes | AI (minutes) | Manual (weeks) | Manual (weeks) |
| Custody | Non-custodial | Platform bank | Platform bank |
| Global access | Anywhere (USDC) | Banking required | Banking required |

## Built By

GigSafe is a product of [Pixxmo](https://pixxmo.wildsnap.in) — an AI product studio building tools for indie founders and developers. Built for the Solana Frontier Hackathon 2026.

## On-Chain Details

- Program ID: `2UFrdXwUEDtr5uXsVrCYuvnGoaESQM9UqVVovEYmsAY4`
- Network: Solana Devnet
- Token: USDC (devnet test token)
- Explorer: [Solana Explorer](https://explorer.solana.com/address/2UFrdXwUEDtr5uXsVrCYuvnGoaESQM9UqVVovEYmsAY4?cluster=devnet)
